summary.conclusion: Contextual fifth-byte steering did not pass the held-out promotion gate.

promotion_rule: Promote only if any held-out non-self-source exact hit appears, or prefix>=5 uplift appears on at least two unrelated held-out corpora and beats same-shape permutation controls.
stop_rule: Stop this transform family if cross-corpus prefix>=5 uplift and exact hits remain zero, or if apparent movement is self-source only.
